bio: UX/UI Designer and visual creative.[BR]I believe in design that combines aesthetics + strategy + purpose to create digital experiences that truly work.

proyectos.title: Turning sales data into daily decisions
proyectos.description: UX/UI design of an ordering app for restaurants, focused on a simple, clear, and frictionless purchasing experience for the end user.
proyectos.reto: Simplify the ordering process to reduce friction and errors during purchase.
proyectos.solucion: Clear ordering flow, intuitive interface, and visual hierarchy focused on key actions.

proyectos.title: Mobile app for ordering at restaurants
proyectos.description: Reduce friction and confusion during the restaurant ordering process from mobile devices.
proyectos.reto: Simple and guided ordering flow, with clear information hierarchy and key actions.
proyectos.solucion: Clear and validatable ordering experience for end users and restaurants.

proyectos.title: IT talent management system
proyectos.description: Functional design base for product validation and job opportunity presentation.
proyectos.reto: Simplify vacancy and application management in the IT sector, eliminating friction for both talent and companies.
proyectos.solucion: Clear and structured platform for posting vacancies and applying in a simple and organized way.

proyectos.title: Informative website for personal growth platform
proyectos.description: Clear and reliable digital presence to communicate the educational offering.
proyectos.reto: Communicate an educational proposal clearly and accessibly, building trust across different user profiles.
proyectos.solucion: Informative website with clear hierarchy, sober visual language, and simple navigation.

proyectos.title: Communicating a country brand in the FITUR context
proyectos.description: Digital support piece for institutional presence and commercial meetings during the event.
proyectos.reto: Communicate the value proposition of a country brand in a competitive and high-impact fair environment like FITUR.
proyectos.solucion: Informative landing page with clear messaging, visual hierarchy, and focus on attraction and positioning.

proyectos.title: Social media post about Climate Week NYC participation
proyectos.description: Coherent and visible digital presence in a global conversation about sustainability.
proyectos.reto: Position a sustainable brand at a global event, maintaining message coherence and international relevance.
proyectos.solucion: Content pieces aligned with the event, with educational, visual, and brand positioning focus.

proyectos.title: Digital presence for personal transformation brand
proyectos.description: Consistent digital presence that reinforces the brand's message and identity.
proyectos.reto: Build a coherent and approachable digital voice to communicate personal and professional transformation processes.
proyectos.solucion: Content system aligned with the brand, with clear, motivational, and actionable messages.

proyectos.title: Using social media for IT talent recruitment
proyectos.description: More relevant communication aligned with the target talent profile.
proyectos.reto: Communicate IT sector vacancies and opportunities clearly and attractively, avoiding generic and undifferentiated messages.
proyectos.solucion: Clear and structured content pieces, focused on value, context, and differentiation of each opportunity.

proyectos.title: Organized and recognizable digital presence on social channels
proyectos.description: Organized and recognizable digital presence on social channels.
proyectos.reto: Communicate tourism services and messages clearly, coherently, and aligned with the brand identity.
proyectos.solucion: Consistent content system, with clear messages and visuals aligned with the brand.

proyectos.title: Effective presentations to connect countries
proyectos.description: Effective commercial material for presentations and conversations with international clients.
proyectos.reto: Communicate a value proposition clearly and attractively for an international and multicultural market.
proyectos.solucion: Pitch deck focused on clarity, information hierarchy, and cultural adaptation of the message.

proyectos.title: Presentations that cross borders
proyectos.description: Coherent and effective presentation for commercial and business meetings.
proyectos.reto: Build a clear and persuasive narrative to present a value proposition to an international market.
proyectos.solucion: Pitch deck based on a clear story, focusing on problem, value, and differentiation.

proyectos.title: Better commercial understanding
proyectos.description: Organized offering ready to support sales processes and client presentations.
proyectos.reto: Structure a clear and understandable service offering, facilitating client comprehension and decision-making.
proyectos.solucion: Service catalog with clear hierarchy, simple language, and value-focused approach.

proyectos.title: A clear message, with international reach
proyectos.description: Editorial piece that served as a vehicle for positioning and communicating a social message internationally.
proyectos.reto: Communicate an editorial vision centered on equity and social justice, connecting with an international audience interested in the African-American market.
proyectos.solucion: Editorial magazine with a clear and coherent narrative, focused on exalting leadership, identity, and cultural value.

recomendaciones.cargo: Customer Success & Operations | AI Automation | Talent & Business Growth | Startups
recomendaciones.mensaje: I recommend Génesis as a talented graphic designer. During our collaboration, I was able to appreciate her creative approach and her ability to develop innovative brand concepts. Génesis stands out for her active listening skills, which ensures precise execution of requirements. Additionally, she is an excellent team collaborator, with assertive communication skills and empathy, meeting established deadlines and adding her personal touch to every design she creates. I recommend Génesis as a talented and passionate professional who will leave a significant mark on any design project.

recomendaciones.cargo: Strategic HR Specialist | Talent Attraction, Retention and Development
recomendaciones.relacion: Held a position senior to Génesis Andreina, but did not directly supervise her
recomendaciones.mensaje: Creative, passionate, and committed — that's how I see Genesis. I was lucky to have her valuable help on projects that greatly benefited the Talent department. She knew how to bring color to every idea. Completely satisfied with her dedication, skills, and delivery.

recomendaciones.cargo: Co-Founder / Head of People at Interfell: Experts in the best tech talent from LATAM #SmartHiring / Head of People @Simera
recomendaciones.mensaje: I had the opportunity to work with Génesis over the last 4 years, during which I witnessed her professional and personal evolution. In terms of design, her experience ranges from brand design, event piece creation, to website and landing page creation, with native design and also optimized for WordPress and HubSpot (as she understands how both CMS work). She is extremely passionate about her work, and teaming up with her was truly rewarding for me. Any agency or client will be fortunate to add her to their team.

recomendaciones.cargo: Technology Project Management | Master's in Management | Systems Engineer | Industrial Engineer | University Professor
recomendaciones.relacion: Held a position senior to Génesis Andreina, but did not directly supervise her
recomendaciones.mensaje: Génesis has a high creative level, always willing to propose solutions with standards of awareness and quality. She designs thinking about user experience — highly recommended as a graphic and web designer.
I highly recommend Génesis. For two years we designed projects that are still making an impact today. Her graphic adaptability, initiative, and commitment are exemplary.

recomendaciones.cargo: Project Manager | HRBP | People Management | HR and Business Management Specialist | HR | Administrator | Virtual Assistant | Business Consultant
recomendaciones.relacion: Held a position senior to Génesis Andreina, but did not directly supervise her
recomendaciones.mensaje: Passionate, Creative, intelligent, resourceful, and she believes in what she does! Génesis worked at Interfell for the last three years. Her role while we were colleagues was key, as she contributed her experience and knowledge to the entire team with great generosity — always collaborative and at the forefront of the TOP colors and designs in the industry. If anyone has the chance to have her on their team as a designer, don't hesitate for a minute! She won't let you down. Her loyalty is invaluable.

recomendaciones.cargo: Chief Operating Officer at Interfell - Experts in the best tech talent from LATAM #SmartHiring
recomendaciones.mensaje: Genesis is an excellent professional; her creativity made our brand something beautiful. Highly recommended!

recomendaciones.relacion: Worked with Génesis Andreina on the same team
recomendaciones.mensaje: Pick a story and Génesis will bring it all the color it needs. She is an excellent professional and graphic designer, with experience, adaptability, and great teamwork. She has immense creativity and originality — exactly what any brand wants for their projects. Totally recommended.

recomendaciones.cargo: Founder @ Interfell - Chief Strategy Officer @ Simera
recomendaciones.mensaje: Genesis is one of the best designers I've worked with. She has been a fundamental pillar in building and evolving the Interfell brand over the past years. She has an incredible ability to adapt to any format — whether social media, ebooks, or web. She is a committed professional with great ability to drive projects forward. 100% recommended.
